title: Aircraft Structure, Surfaces, Rigging, and Systems Assemblers
description: Assemble, fit, fasten, and install parts of airplanes, space vehicles, or missiles, such as tails, wings, fuselage, bulkheads, stabilizers, landing gear, rigging and control equipment, or heating and ventilating systems.

tasks.text: Assemble parts, fittings, or subassemblies on aircraft, using layout tools, hand tools, power tools, or fasteners, such as bolts, screws, rivets, or clamps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read blueprints, illustrations, or specifications to determine layouts, sequences of operations, or identities or relationships of parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach brackets, hinges, or clips to secure or support components or subassemblies, using bolts, screws, rivets, chemical bonding, or welding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect or test installed units, parts, systems, or assemblies for fit, alignment, performance, defects, or compliance with standards, using measuring instruments or test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust, repair, rework, or replace parts or assemblies to ensure proper operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut, trim, file, bend, or smooth parts to ensure proper fit and clearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate parts needed for assembly or installation, using shop machinery or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Layout and mark reference points and locations for installation of parts or components, using jigs, templates, or measuring and marking instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, oil, or coat system components, as necessary, before assembly or attachment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble prefabricated parts to form subassemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set, align, adjust, or synchronize aircraft armament or rigging or control system components to established tolerances or requirements, using sighting devices and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Join structural assemblies, such as wings, tails, or fuselage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position and align subassemblies in jigs or fixtures, using measuring instruments and following blueprint lines and index points.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble prototypes or integrated-technology demonstrators of new or emerging environmental technologies for aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manually install structural assemblies or signal crane operators to position assemblies for joining.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align, fit, assemble, connect, or install system components, using jigs, fixtures, measuring instruments, hand tools, or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or operate machines or systems to crimp, cut, bend, form, swage, flare, bead, burr, or straighten tubing, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place and connect control cables to electronically controlled units, using hand tools, ring locks, cotter keys, threaded connectors, turnbuckles, or related devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install mechanical linkages and actuators, using tensiometers to verify tension of cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean aircraft structures, parts, or components, using aqueous, semi-aqueous, aliphatic hydrocarbon, or organic solvent cleaning products or techniques to reduce carbon or other harmful emissions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install accessories in swaging machines, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mark identifying information on tubing or cable assemblies, using etching devices, labels, rubber stamps, or other methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Verify dimensions of cable assemblies or positions of fittings, using measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Weld tubing and fittings or solder cable ends, using tack welders, induction brazing chambers, or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit and fasten sheet metal coverings to surface areas or other sections of aircraft prior to welding or riveting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Capture or segregate waste material, such as aluminum swarf, machine cutting fluid, or solvents, for recycling or environmentally responsible disposal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut cables and tubing, using master templates, measuring instruments, and cable cutters or saws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
